title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Delhi

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Delhi
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
